name: Shigeru Miyamoto
bio: Often called the father of modern video games, Shigeru Miyamoto created some of the most influential franchises in history. His emphasis on playful, intuitive design shaped the language of game mechanics for generations of developers.

name: Hideo Kojima
bio: A pioneer of cinematic, narrative-driven games, Hideo Kojima is renowned for blending stealth gameplay with film-quality storytelling. He helped establish the stealth genre and is celebrated as one of gaming's foremost auteurs.

name: John Carmack
bio: A legendary engine programmer, John Carmack pioneered real-time 3D graphics on consumer hardware. His work on DOOM and Quake defined the first-person shooter and advanced PC gaming, networked multiplayer, and open-source game code.

name: Gabe Newell
bio: Co-founder of Valve, Gabe Newell led the creation of the genre-defining Half-Life series and built Steam into the dominant PC games platform, reshaping how games are distributed, sold, and played worldwide.

name: Roberta Williams
bio: A trailblazer of the adventure game genre, Roberta Williams co-founded Sierra On-Line and created the King's Quest series, helping pioneer graphical adventure games and storytelling in interactive media.

name: Lee 'Faker' Sang-hyeok
notableWorks: Multiple League of Legends World Championships
Considered the greatest LoL player of all time
bio: Widely regarded as the greatest League of Legends player ever, Faker has won multiple World Championships and become the face of competitive esports, inspiring a generation of professional players.
